description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.30.4 ports upstream CodexBar v0.30.1 safety fixes, adds safe provider diagnostics via codexbar diagnose, improves Claude OAuth 429 backoff while preserving credentials, and adds Providers sidebar spacing polish.
